violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors behind the kitchen equipment have food debris along with cups/lids. Need to be cleaned more thoroughly. Walk-in freezer has ice build-up and food debris, needs to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood and suppression systems need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Cake boxes, fry containers, and other single service items located under waste pipe in basement storage.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Food boxes on the shelf above prep cooler are not inverted.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
